creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

I remember read about webcamera setup in Handbook Multimedia chapter but it is not available now.

I found a good example that it might be good to add to Handbook:

https://vermaden.wordpress.com/2021/05/26/freebsd-desktop-part-26-configuration-conferencing-and-meetings/

---
Conferencing and Meetings

The Table of Contents for the article:

-    Camera Setup
-    Microphone Setup
-    Meetings
-    Closing Thoughts
---

Thanks
